theme_selection.reasoning: A financial and stock management system demands absolute clarity, authority, and low cognitive load. We use a high-contrast 'Swiss' aesthetic with a stark white base, neutral grays, and a sharp primary blue to direct attention to critical data without visual clutter. This aligns perfectly with the user's request for a 'lighter and more intuitive design'.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Functional whitespace. The system is data-heavy (invoices, stock), so cards must have generous internal padding (p-6) to prevent claustrophobia. The grid follows the 'Control Room' protocol.
spacing_and_layout.card_style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-zinc-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden

components_strategy.buttons: Shadcn UI button. Flat design, rounded-lg. Primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 hover:-translate-y-[1px] transition-all. Avoid heavy shadows.
components_strategy.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn UI Input/Select. Flat, rounded-lg, border-zinc-200. Focus ring: ring-2 ring-blue-600/20 border-blue-600. No native datepickers; use Shadcn Calendar.
components_strategy.tables: Crucial for 'Gestão TJ'. Use Shadcn Table. Header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-500 bg-zinc-50. Rows: border-b border-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-50/50. Align numbers/currency to the right.
components_strategy.modals: Shadcn Dialog. Backdrop blur (backdrop-blur-sm bg-zinc-950/20) to maintain focus. Modal surface must be flat white, p-6.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts / Shadcn Charts. Use minimalist line charts for DRE and bar charts for Stock levels. Remove heavy grid lines (use stroke-dasharray '3 3' stroke '#E4E4E7'). Tooltips must have shadow-lg and rounded-lg.
components_strategy.cards: Never stack nested cards. Use a single level of elevation. Use 'Neumorphism' clay crisp style: 1px border grounding it, soft shadow.
components_strategy.badges: For stock status, user roles, invoice status. Rounded-full, px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must have a subtle background color shift and a slight translation. e.g., hover:bg-zinc-100 transition-colors duration-200.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer Motion. Simple fade in: initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}.
motion_and_interactions.list_stagger: When loading rows of stock or invoices, stagger the entrance by 0.05s.

logos.description: Geometric stylized 'TJ' monogram representing Gestão TJ inventory and accounting software.

backgrounds.description: A light, minimalist abstract 3D geometric background for the login page, conveying efficiency and modern software.
Clean white architectural structure, useful for secondary marketing banners or empty states.

design_rules.accessibility: All text must pass APCA contrast ratio. Do not use generic grays for text. Apply 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms for testing.
design_rules.borders: Always use subtle borders (border-zinc-200) rather than relying solely on shadows to separate dashboard regions.
design_rules.data_density: Stock tracking and DRE tables should be dense but readable. Use small text sizes (text-sm) combined with adequate row heights (h-12).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install specific fonts via Google Fonts: Outfit (headings), IBM Plex Sans (body), JetBrains Mono (data tables).
Install @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react for sharp, consistent UI iconography.
Set up Tailwind variables mapped to the color palette above. The neutral scale should be Zinc.
Do not build complex components (Tables, Datepickers) from scratch; strictly use Shadcn UI and style them using these guidelines.
When building the login screen, split it into two panes: left pane with the auth_background image (object-cover) and logo, right pane with the login form (pure white background).
For the 'Gestão TJ' dashboard layout, use a fixed sidebar with a top header and scrollable main content area.
Ensure the DRE and Financial reports use green (#16A34A) for positive margins and red (#DC2626) for negative/costs.
Add 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'data-testid="login-submit-btn"', 'data-testid="stock-table"') to all interactive or key display elements.
